allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe", "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "ENCONTRADO: $p"; & $p --version } else { Write-Output "no esta: $p" } }; Write-Output "--- Busqueda en nvm ---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\nvm"\) { Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\nvm" -Directory | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name } else { Write-Output "no hay carpeta nvm" })
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; Write-Output "node:"; node --version; Write-Output "npm:"; npm --version)

PowerShell($dirs = @\("server\\routes", "server\\services", "public\\css", "public\\js"\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $d | Out-Null }; Write-Output "Carpetas creadas:"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Directory | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "C:\\Users\\proyectos\\prode"; $env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; node server/server.js }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $ping = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/ping" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "RESPUESTA DEL SERVIDOR:"; $ping | ConvertTo-Json; $home = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "PAGINA PRINCIPAL: codigo HTTP $\($home.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" } finally { Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://www.thesportsdb.com/api/v1/json/3/searchteams.php?t=River%20Plate" -TimeoutSec 15; $eq = $r.teams[0]; Write-Output "Campos utiles del equipo:"; $eq | Select-Object strTeam, strCountry, strLeague, strStadium, strBadge, strTeamBadge | Format-List } catch { Write-Output "ERROR: $_" })
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\proyectos\\prode"; npm test 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "pass|fail|tests")
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\proyectos\\prode"; node diag-pronos.js; Remove-Item "C:\\Users\\proyectos\\prode\\diag-pronos.js" -Force)
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\proyectos\\prode"; node limpiar-seed.js; Remove-Item "C:\\Users\\proyectos\\prode\\limpiar-seed.js" -Force)
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\proyectos\\prode"; npm test 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "✔|✘|pass|fail|tests")
